title: staff — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by StaffServiceProvider::boot(). All rules are used both by the observer chain (for authoritative refusal on write) AND by FormRequest data classes (for early request-time validation with clear error surfaces). The compensation + emergency-contact permission checks live in policies + observers, not in rules — rules validate shape, not authorization.

rules.name: valid_hex_color
rules.description: Standard hex color validator. Used for any UI-provided colour field on Coach.head_shot_url metadata (badge tint on the coach profile card).
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_e164_phone
rules.description: E.164 phone number (`+CC-NNN-NNN-NNNN` shape without the dashes). Used on Staff.emergency_contact_phone + Coach.public_phone.
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_url
rules.description: URL validator. Used on Coach.head_shot_url + Coach.certifications[].certificate_url + Coach.public_email (email variant).
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_bcp47_locale
rules.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. `en-US`, `fr`, `ar-EG`). Used on Coach.languages[].
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_iso4217_currency
rules.description: ISO 4217 currency code (three-letter uppercase). Used on Staff.compensation_currency.
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_positive_int
rules.description: Non-negative integer. Used on Staff.weekly_hours + Staff.compensation_amount_cents + Coach.session_capacity_per_week + Coach.rating_count.
rules.reference: foundation-owned; consumed by staff via aliasing

rules.name: valid_certifications_shape
rules.description: Validates the Coach.certifications JSONB blob against schemas/coach.schema.json.certifications. Every entry is a strict object with { organization: string (required, max 128), certification: string (required, max 128), certified_at: YYYY-MM-DD (required), expires_at: YYYY-MM-DD | null, certificate_url: URL | null, verified_at: ISO 8601 | null (only when coach_certifications_verified entitlement is on), verified_by_user_id: ULID | null }. Refuses when: any required field is missing, expires_at < certified_at, certified_at > today() + 30 days (rejects nonsense future certifications), or when the entry contains keys outside the closed shape.
rules.default_message: The :attribute contains an invalid certification entry. Each entry must include organization, certification, and certified_at; expires_at must be after certified_at.

rules.name: valid_availability_pattern
rules.description: Validates Coach.availability_pattern JSONB against schemas/availability-pattern.schema.json. Same day-shape as facility.availability_json ({monday: [{starts: 'HH:MM', ends: 'HH:MM'}], ...}) but expresses when this Coach is available for coaching (a subset of when their Staff is scheduled on the branch). Non-overlapping windows within a day; ends > starts.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid availability pattern. Each day must have non-overlapping HH:MM–HH:MM windows.

rules.name: probation_within_bounds
rules.description: Staff.probation_ends_at, when set, MUST be at most 365 days after started_at. Rejects nonsense probation windows that would violate common labour-law caps.
rules.default_message: Probation cannot exceed 365 days from the start date.

rules.name: termination_reason_required_when_offboarded
rules.description: When Staff.employment_status transitions to offboarding OR offboarded, termination_reason MUST be non-null. Rejects offboards without documented reason (compliance signal — anti-discrimination pattern detection depends on this).
rules.default_message: A termination reason is required when offboarding a staff member.

rules.name: one_active_staff_per_user_tenant
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, user_id, deleted_at IS NULL). One active Staff row per (tenant, user). Rehires must first offboard the existing.
rules.default_message: This user already has an active staff record in this tenant.

rules.name: one_active_branch_manager_per_branch
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (branch_id, is_branch_manager=true, employment_status='active', deleted_at IS NULL). Exactly one active branch_manager per branch.
rules.default_message: This branch already has an active manager. Demote the existing manager first, or use /promote-to-manager for the atomic swap.

rules.name: coach_staff_active
rules.description: Coach.staff_id MUST reference a Staff whose employment_status='active'. Applied on Coach.create + Coach.update paths.
rules.default_message: The parent Staff must be active to attach a Coach profile.

rules.name: certification_expiry_in_future_when_added
rules.description: When appending a new certification via /coaches/{coach}/certifications, expires_at (if set) MUST be > today(). Rejects retroactive-expiry entries; the ExpireCoachCertificationsJob owns the transition to expired state.
rules.default_message: Certification expiry must be in the future. Set expires_at to a future date, or leave it null for indefinite certifications.
